channel.title: Triston Armstrong
channel.description: Senior Software Engineer, father, and husband with a passion for building utility apps and automating the boring stuff.

item.title: Fixing Windows Error 0xc000000f After Installing Linux
item.description: This guide details how to resolve the common dual-boot 0xc000000f BCD error that occurs when a Linux installation alters the EFI System Partition (ESP) layout or UUID. It provides a step-by-step walkthrough using a Windows installation USB, diskpart, and the bcdboot command to safely recreate the missing or broken boot files without risking your Linux setup.

item.title: Custom Rust Errors
item.description: Centralizing error management using a custom Error enum and map_error resolves the complexity of disparate error types, establishing a single, type-safe contract across the entire application boundary for given domains.

item.title: Android Screen Mirroring
item.description: If you’re still tolerating macOS only because you need reliable Android screen mirroring, it’s time to drop the excuse. Linux users have been enjoying a superior, free, and buttery-smooth solution called scrcpy for years.

item.title: The macOS mDNS Bug
item.description: ssh pi@raspberrypi worked fine until I typed the wrong password a few times. Then one MacBook completely lost the hostname while the other was fine. I was convinced it was fail2ban on the Pi (even though it wasn't installed). Here's the weird macOS cache issue, the fix, and why Linux just doesn't do this nonsense.

item.title: Fixing Flatpak Crashes on Linux Mint
item.description: If you switched from Wayland back to X11 and your Flatpak apps won't launch, you've got a ghost socket haunting your session. Here's the fix.

item.title: Kiru v1: A New Reactive Paradigm
item.description: A look into the process of updating my personal site to Kiru v1, exploring the new reactive primitives, and adopting the new routing interface.

item.title: Linux Auto Switch Gpu Modes
item.description: This is primarily for asus linux laptops but im sure it can work for others with slight mods

item.title: Auto Fetch Webapp Icons On Omarchy
item.description: The why and how I added some auto fetch logic when installing webapps

item.title: Omarchy flatpak support
item.description: I go over why I added flatpak support and how

item.title: Building A Lightweight CI Daemon in Rust
item.description: What it took for me to build my own CI-CD and why I did it.

item.title: The Netflix Interview That Didn't Go Well
item.description: I interviewed at netflix, and it didn't go so well. Here I outline the problems I had.

item.title: My Ideal Operating System
item.description: Here I go over the OS of my choice. What I love, and what I hate about the various OS's I've tried over the years.
